Package com.audiodo.aspen

Class IDeviceService

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.audiodo.aspen.IDeviceService
  • Direct Known Subclasses:
    IVirtualDeviceService
    public class IDeviceService
extends java.lang.Object
    The DeviceService

    This class is the DeviceService, providing access to capabilities that can be interacted with
    on an audio device. It also provides the transport layer interface to enable communication
    over a transport defined by the user of this class.

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Modifier Constructor Description
      protected IDeviceService​(long cPtr, boolean cMemoryOwn)  

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Static Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods Deprecated Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      void delete()  
      protected void finalize()  
      IAncCapability getAncCapability()
      Getter for the IAncCapability for this device service

      Gets an interface to the ANC capability to be used for getting and setting the
      ANC mode on a device..
      If the device service, and thereby its remote audio device does not support this, then
      a nullptr will be returned.
      IAudiodoTransparencyCapability getAudiodoTransparencyCapability()
      Getter for the IAudiodoTransparency for this device service

      Gets an interface to the audiodo transparency capability.
      If the device service, and thereby its remote audio device does not
      support this, then a nullptr will be returned.
      IAudiosphereIrCapability getAudiosphereIrCapability()
      Getter for the IAudiosphereIrCapability for this device service

      Gets an interface to the Audiosphere IR capability used for controlling the effect on a
      device.
      IBassBoostCapability getBassBoostCapability()
      Getter for the IBassBoostCapability for this device service

      Gets an interface to the Bass Boost capability used for controlling the bass boost on a
      device.
      IBatteryCapability getBatteryCapability()
      Getter for the IBatteryCapability for this device service

      Gets an interface to the battery capability to be used for getting battery level.
      If the device service, and thereby its remote audio device does not support this, then
      a nullptr will be returned.
      ICalibrationCapability getCalibrationCapability()
      Getter for the ICalibrationCapability for this device service

      Gets an interface to the calibration capability to be used for running calibrations.
      If the device service, and thereby its remote audio device does not support this, then
      a nullptr will be returned.
      protected static long getCPtr​(IDeviceService obj)  
      IDetailEnhancerCapability getDetailEnhancerCapability()
      Getter for the IDetailEnhancerCapability for this device service

      Gets an interface to the DetailEnhancer capability used for controlling the detail_enhancer on a
      device.
      IDeviceInfoCapability getDeviceInfoCapability()
      Getter for the IDeviceInfoCapability for this device service

      Gets an interface to the device info capability used for retrieving information regarding
      the device.
      IEqualizerCapability getEqualizerCapability()
      Getter for the IEqualizerCapability for this device service

      Gets an interface to the Equalizer capability used for controlling the equalizer on a device.
      If the device service, and thereby its remote audio device does not support this, then
      a nullptr will be returned.
      IHeadTrackCapability getHeadtrackCapability()
      Getter for the IHeadTrackCapability for this device service

      Gets an interface to the HeadTrack capability used for controlling the effect on a
      device.
      IProfileCapability getProfileCapability()
      Getter for the IProfileCapability for this device service

      Gets an interface to the profile capability to be used for e.g.
      ISpatializerCapability getSpatializerCapability()
      Getter for the ISpatializerCapability for this device service

      Gets an interface to the Spatializer capability used for controlling the spatializer on a
      device.
      IVolumeCapability getVolumeCapability()
      Getter for the IVolumeCapability for this device service

      Gets an interface to the volume capability.
      If the device service, and thereby its remote audio device does not
      support this, then a nullptr will be returned.
      CapabilitySupportStatus isAncCapabilitySupported()
      Check whether IAncCapability is supported or not

      Function will always return CapabilitySupportStatus::connection_required until the callback
      IDeviceServiceCallbacks::session_established has been received.
      CapabilitySupportStatus isAudiodoTransparencyCapabilitySupported()
      Check whether IAudiodoTransparencyCapability is supported or not

      Function will always return CapabilitySupportStatus::connection_required until the callback
      IDeviceServiceCallbacks::session_established has been received.
      CapabilitySupportStatus isAudiosphereIrCapabilitySupported()
      Check whether IAudiosphereIrCapability is supported or not

      Function will always return CapabilitySupportStatus::connection_required until the callback
      IDeviceServiceCallbacks::session_established has been received.

      Check whether IBassBoostCapability is supported or not

      Function will always return CapabilitySupportStatus::connection_required until the callback
      IDeviceServiceCallbacks::session_established has been received.

      Check whether IBatteryCapability is supported or not

      IDeviceServiceCallbacks::session_established has been received.
      CapabilitySupportStatus isCalibrationCapabilitySupported()
      Check whether ICalibrationCapability is supported or not

      Function will always return CapabilitySupportStatus::connection_required until the callback
      IDeviceServiceCallbacks::session_established has been received.
      boolean isConnectionOk()
      Returns a bool signifying whether the connection is ok or not

      Returns a bool signifying whether the connection is ok or not.
      When earbuds are being used, the connection is considered OK
      when both earbuds are connected.
      CapabilitySupportStatus isDetailEnhancerCapabilitySupported()
      Check whether IDetailEnhancerCapability is supported or not

      Function will always return CapabilitySupportStatus::connection_required until the callback
      IDeviceServiceCallbacks::session_established has been received.

      Function will always return CapabilitySupportStatus::connection_required until the callback

      void onRx​(Uint8Vector bytes)
      Called when rx data arrives over the connected transport to an audio device.

      Passes received rx data to a connected transport manager.
      void onTransportConnect​(IDeviceServiceCallbacks cbs, long mtu)
      Called when a transport is successfully connected and available to Aspen

      Informs Aspen that a new transport connection is setup and available to
      facilitate communication.
      void onTransportDisconnect()
      Called when a transport is disconnected.

      Informs Aspen that a transport connection has terminated.
      void requestSessionClose()
      Close the current session

      Function to inform connected device that the client wants to
      close the current session.

      boolean supportsSessionClose()
      Returns a bool signifying whether the session can be closed by Aspen

      Function will always return false for devices not supporting that Aspen closes the session

    • Method Detail

      • getCPtr

        protected void swigSetCMemOwn​(boolean own)

      • finalize

        protected void finalize()
        Overrides:
        finalize in class java.lang.Object

      • delete

        public void delete()

      • onTransportConnect

        public void onTransportConnect​(IDeviceServiceCallbacks cbs,
                               long mtu)
        Called when a transport is successfully connected and available to Aspen

        Informs Aspen that a new transport connection is setup and available to
        facilitate communication. Any mtu requirements need to be passed here to inform
        Aspen about how to fragment the data. In case any further fragmentation take place
        in lower layers of communication this needs to be reassembled before passed to
        the Audiodo rx counter part on the firmware device.

        Parameters:
        cbs - A reference to a ITransportSessionCallbacks implementation over which the
        TransportManager will communicate.

        mtu - The mtu (maximum transmission unit) allowed for the transport, i.e. the
        maximum size allowed for a frame of bytes passed with the tx_send callback.
        The minimum mtu value is 2.

      • onTransportDisconnect

        public void onTransportDisconnect()
        Called when a transport is disconnected.

        Informs Aspen that a transport connection has terminated. This will trigger teardown
        and handling of outstanding data within Aspen. Once a new connection is established it
        will need to be setup by calling on_transport_connect once more.

      • onRx

        public void onRx​(Uint8Vector bytes)
        Called when rx data arrives over the connected transport to an audio device.

        Passes received rx data to a connected transport manager. If a connection is not setup when
        this is called nothing will happen and an error will be logged.
        Aspen will not modify this data, but read and parse it.

        Parameters:
        bytes - The bytes to be passed to Aspen.

      • supportsCalibrationCapability

        @Nullable
@Deprecated(since="1.14.0",
            forRemoval=true)
public boolean supportsCalibrationCapability()
        Deprecated, for removal: This API element is subject to removal in a future version.
        This function is deprecated in favour of is_calibration_capability_supported.

        Returns a bool signifying whether the device service has an ICalibrationCapability

        Returns:
        True when the device service has a calibration capability, false when it does not.

      • isCalibrationCapabilitySupported

        public CapabilitySupportStatus isCalibrationCapabilitySupported()
        Check whether ICalibrationCapability is supported or not

        Function will always return CapabilitySupportStatus::connection_required until the callback
        IDeviceServiceCallbacks::session_established has been received. Once it has, the function returns
        CapabilitySupportStatus::supported if the device service has a ICalibrationCapability,
        CapabilitySupportStatus::not_supported if not.

        Returns:
        CapabilitySupportStatus signifying whether the device service has a ICalibrationCapability.

      • getCalibrationCapability

        @Nullable
public ICalibrationCapability getCalibrationCapability()
        Getter for the ICalibrationCapability for this device service

        Gets an interface to the calibration capability to be used for running calibrations.
        If the device service, and thereby its remote audio device does not support this, then
        a nullptr will be returned. Actions on a calibration capability that affects the remote
        audio device will not be possible if the service does not have a session to it. Calls
        to such methods while a session is not established will be ignored.

        Returns:
        A pointer to the calibration capability, or nullptr if not supported.

      • supportsProfileCapability

        @Nullable
@Deprecated(since="1.14.0",
            forRemoval=true)
public boolean supportsProfileCapability()
        Deprecated, for removal: This API element is subject to removal in a future version.
        This function is deprecated in favour of is_profile_capability_supported.

        Returns a bool signifying whether the device service has an IProfileCapability

        Returns:
        True when device service has a profile capability, false when it does not.

      • isProfileCapabilitySupported

        public CapabilitySupportStatus isProfileCapabilitySupported()
        Check whether IProfileCapability is supported or not

        Function will always return CapabilitySupportStatus::connection_required until the callback
        IDeviceServiceCallbacks::session_established has been received. Once it has, the function returns
        CapabilitySupportStatus::supported if the device service has a IProfileCapability,
        CapabilitySupportStatus::not_supported if not.

        Returns:
        CapabilitySupportStatus signifying whether the device service has a IProfileCapability.

      • getProfileCapability

        @Nullable
public IProfileCapability getProfileCapability()
        Getter for the IProfileCapability for this device service

        Gets an interface to the profile capability to be used for e.g. activating and
        deactivating profiles on a device.
        If the device service, and thereby its remote audio device does not support this, then
        a nullptr will be returned. Actions on a profile capability that affects the remote
        audio device will not be possible if the service does not have a session to it. Calls
        to such methods while a session is not established will be ignored.

        Returns:
        A pointer to the profile capability, or nullptr if not supported.

        @Nullable
@Deprecated(since="1.14.0",
            forRemoval=true)
public boolean supportsBatteryCapability()

        This function is deprecated in favour of is_battery_capability_supported.

        Returns a bool signifying whether the device service has an IBatteryCapability

        Returns:
        True when device service has a battery capability, false when it does not.

      • isBatteryCapabilitySupported

        public CapabilitySupportStatus isBatteryCapabilitySupported()
        Check whether IBatteryCapability is supported or not

        Function will always return CapabilitySupportStatus::connection_required until the callback
        IDeviceServiceCallbacks::session_established has been received. Once it has, the function returns
        CapabilitySupportStatus::supported if the device service has a IBatteryCapability,
        CapabilitySupportStatus::not_supported if not.

        Returns:
        CapabilitySupportStatus signifying whether the device service has a IBatteryCapability.

      • getBatteryCapability

        @Nullable
public IBatteryCapability getBatteryCapability()
        Getter for the IBatteryCapability for this device service

        Gets an interface to the battery capability to be used for getting battery level.
        If the device service, and thereby its remote audio device does not support this, then
        a nullptr will be returned.

        Returns:
        A pointer to the battery capability, or nullptr if not supported.

      • getAncCapability

        @Nullable
public IAncCapability getAncCapability()
        Getter for the IAncCapability for this device service

        Gets an interface to the ANC capability to be used for getting and setting the
        ANC mode on a device..
        If the device service, and thereby its remote audio device does not support this, then
        a nullptr will be returned.

        Returns:
        A pointer to the ANC capability, or nullptr if not supported.

      • getEqualizerCapability

        @Nullable
public IEqualizerCapability getEqualizerCapability()
        Getter for the IEqualizerCapability for this device service

        Gets an interface to the Equalizer capability used for controlling the equalizer on a device.
        If the device service, and thereby its remote audio device does not support this, then
        a nullptr will be returned.

        Returns:
        A pointer to the Equalizer capability, or nullptr if not supported.

        the device. If the device service, and thereby its remote audio device does not support this, then
        a nullptr will be returned.

        Returns:
        A pointer to the device info capability, or nullptr if not supported.

        Getter for the IDetailEnhancerCapability for this device service

        Gets an interface to the DetailEnhancer capability used for controlling the detail_enhancer on a
        device. If the device service, and thereby its remote audio device does not support this,
        then a nullptr will be returned.

        Returns:
        A pointer to the DetailEnhancer capability, or nullptr if not supported

      • isAudiosphereIrCapabilitySupported

        public CapabilitySupportStatus isAudiosphereIrCapabilitySupported()
        Check whether IAudiosphereIrCapability is supported or not

        Function will always return CapabilitySupportStatus::connection_required until the callback
        IDeviceServiceCallbacks::session_established has been received. Once it has, the function returns
        CapabilitySupportStatus::supported if the device service has a IAudiosphereIrCapability,
        CapabilitySupportStatus::not_supported if not.

        Returns:
        CapabilitySupportStatus signifying whether the device service has a IAudiosphereIrCapability.

      • getAudiosphereIrCapability

        @Nullable
public IAudiosphereIrCapability getAudiosphereIrCapability()
        Getter for the IAudiosphereIrCapability for this device service

        Gets an interface to the Audiosphere IR capability used for controlling the effect on a
        device. If the device service, and thereby its remote audio device does not support this,
        then a nullptr will be returned.

        Returns:
        A pointer to the Audiosphere IR capability, or nullptr if not supported

      • isHeadtrackCapabilitySupported

        public CapabilitySupportStatus isHeadtrackCapabilitySupported()
        Check whether IHeadTrackCapability is supported or not

        Function will always return CapabilitySupportStatus::connection_required until the callback
        IDeviceServiceCallbacks::session_established has been received. Once it has, the function returns
        CapabilitySupportStatus::supported if the device service has a IHeadTrackCapability,
        CapabilitySupportStatus::not_supported if not.

        Returns:
        CapabilitySupportStatus signifying whether the device service has a IHeadTrackCapability.

      • getHeadtrackCapability

        @Nullable
public IHeadTrackCapability getHeadtrackCapability()
        Getter for the IHeadTrackCapability for this device service

        Gets an interface to the HeadTrack capability used for controlling the effect on a
        device. If the device service, and thereby its remote audio device does not support this,
        then a nullptr will be returned.

        Returns:
        A pointer to the HeadTrack capability, or nullptr if not supported

      • isConnectionOk

        public boolean isConnectionOk()
        Returns a bool signifying whether the connection is ok or not

        Returns a bool signifying whether the connection is ok or not.
        When earbuds are being used, the connection is considered OK
        when both earbuds are connected. When only one earbud is connected
        the return value will be false.

        Returns:
        True when the connection is OK, false when it is not.

      • supportsSessionClose

        public boolean supportsSessionClose()
        Returns a bool signifying whether the session can be closed by Aspen

        Function will always return false for devices not supporting that Aspen closes the session

        Returns:
        True when device supports the feature, false otherwise.

      • requestSessionClose

        public void requestSessionClose()
        Close the current session

        Function to inform connected device that the client wants to
        close the current session. This should only be used when the user
        of this API wants to close a session. It should not be called in case
        of a transport disconnect. Then on_transport_disconnect() should be called
        instead.
